strategies.name: Mixed Best EV WF Train 2020-2025 + slot blackout 12-13:30 + drop n=3.0
strategies.description: LIVE candidate (locked 2026-04-08). Walk-forward NQ 5min: cells fit on 2020-01-01..2025-12-31, unbounded selector + drop negative-train-PnL cells, then drop entire 12:00-12:30 and 13:00-13:30 time slots, then drop all rr=3.0 cells. Full Kelly tiers (0.5%/1.5%/3.0%). Discovered via WF time-slot analysis: 12:00-12:30 lost in 4/6 years (-$6k 6y sum), 13:00-13:30 lost in 4/6 years (-$12k 6y sum, biggest negative slot). Full 6-year WF series: 2021 +90.1% / 2022 +48.2% / 2023 +23.9% / 2024 -11.2% / 2025 +68.3% / 2026 YTD +21.1%. 5y sum +219.3 (vs combo +192.7). Worst max DD 31.0% (2024). 2026 YTD: +21.1% / PF 1.12 / DD 21.2%.
